caption.text:
🎬 Exciting news! The trailer for “The Anti Diet, Diet Club” is finally here! 🍽️💪

Follow @antidietdietclub_doc & Tag three friends below who need to see this for a chance to win tickets to our exclusive red carpet screening! 🎟️✨

Get ready to challenge everything you thought you knew about dieting, health and the mindset shift that comes with extreme weight loss transformation. 

Enter the mind and hear the stories of 6 unique people with a combined weight loss of 1,400lbs 

Featuring: 

David Roden @fit_drock 

John Arpino @jarps_journey 

Dalton Musslewhite @msslwht 

Desiree Mize Wokeuplikedez 

Levi Garret @fluffygotfit 

Benyamin Aki @benyamin_aki

Dani Smith @Danibabi17

Layne Norton P.h.D. @biolayne

Dr. Spencer Nadolsky @drnadolsky 

🎥 Watch the full trailer now at [www.antidietdietclubdoc.com](http://www.antidietdietclubdoc.com) and join us on this transformative journey!

#AntiDietDietClub

caption.text:
Full episode available now! 

Link in bio or story highlights 

Episode 1 dives into the chaos of online dating, the messiest moments in reality TV, and why Vagisil somehow made it into the chat. It’s unfiltered, slightly unhinged, and definitely not your average relationship talk.

caption.text:
What is something you didn’t realize till you lost weight?
.
.
For me it was how my size to others determined what type of individual I was. 
#weightlossjourney #fitat40 #looseskin #selflove
